libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image test runs on JDK 25, set the same Netty runtime properties used for 4.2.3: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Do not gate this only on 4.2.3; 4.2.4 needs the same nativeTest runtime arguments.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8594 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.netty:netty-transport-classes-io_uring:4.2.4.Final; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Full live io_uring I/O coverage normally requires the platform-specific netty-transport-native-io_uring classifier, a Linux kernel with io_uring support, and sufficient memlock. The target artifact is netty-transport-classes-io_uring, so tests should still handle IoUring.isAvailable() being false.
The deterministic dependency setup schema does not express Maven classifiers; adding the unclassified native artifact would not provide the native .so.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Netty 4.2.4 disables sun.misc.Unsafe by default on Java 25 unless explicitly allowed, which is relevant to the reported native-image run failure; transitive Maven dependencies are otherwise sufficient for the classes artifact.
